response.global_summary: The video features a waiting screen with music followed by a live performance of the song "Diva" by the virtual YouTuber Tokino Sora.

scenes.description: Intro/waiting screen with on-screen text "#ときのそらお披露目誕生日2026". No vocal music.
Tokino Sora performs the song "Diva" on stage.

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the VTuber Performance**

Okay, so I've got this video of a VTuber, Tokino Sora, performing a song, and I need to identify it and get the lyrics. First, I need to map out the scene. From 00:00 to 02:41, it's just an intro screen with text about a birthday event in 2026 – that's the pre-show. The performance itself kicks off at 02:42, and Tokino Sora is on stage singing until the end.

Now, to identify the song. The on-screen text gives it away: initially, I see “#ときのそらお披露目誕生日2026," then I see "Diva" and "作詞・作曲: Aira(Dream Monster)” at the bottom of the screen. I just want to make absolutely sure. Yes, at 02:56 and onwards, "Diva" is prominently displayed, along with the songwriter credit. So, confirmed: the song is "Diva" by Tokino Sora.

Alright, time for a search strategy. My initial search will be "ときのそら Diva 歌詞" in Japanese, aiming for the original lyrics. I'll follow up with "Tokino Sora Diva lyrics English" if the first one doesn't pan out. I have a few constraints I need to keep in mind, though. I'm not going to transcribe or translate anything myself; the search has to do the work. If the search fails, I'll return a null result. And, obviously, no truncations or placeholders – I need the full lyrics. I won't use quotes in the search terms either. Finally, there's a three-turn limit. Time to execute!



**My Analysis of the "Diva" Song Data**

Okay, I've got this. The search successfully retrieved the Japanese lyrics for Tokino Sora's "Diva." No official English translation was found, which is exactly what I expected, so `reference_lyrics_en` will be set to `null` as per the guidelines. I checked that `plyric.com` result again just to be sure, and no translation is there. Perfect. We are not to translate the lyrics.

Now, I'll assemble the final response. I have all the data.

I've got the video breakdown: the intro/waiting screen goes from 00:00 to 02:41, and then the live performance of "Diva" starts at 02:42 and goes until 05:02. That's all the relevant vocal content in the video.

The song details are clear: "Diva" by Tokino Sora, performed by Tokino Sora, in Japanese. The Japanese lyrics are ready (pulled directly from the web search), and the English lyrics are `null` because no translation was available online.

I'm now going to format the lyrics correctly to be displayed. I made sure to represent those lyrics directly from the source, as requested.

Now, one final check on the timings... Intro: 00:00.000 to 02:41.000, Performance: 02:42.000 to 05:02.000. Confirmed.

Everything is in order. I'm ready to provide the complete analysis.
